name: College Friends
overview: It's a story of 7 friends navigating the rollercoaster of college life filled with chaos, crushes, confusion, and moments that stay with you forever. Whether you’re still in college or have left those days behind, this series is a nostalgic, heartfelt trip back to where it all began.

trailers.title: College Friends | Official Trailer | Omkar, Devishi Madaan, Baishali Sinha
